name: Basic Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Place chocolate in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate melts.
3. Cream shortening, gradually adding sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix in melted chocolate.
6. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, and salt; add alternately with buttermilk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Beat after each addition.
7. Add water, mixing well. Stir in vanilla.
8. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans and let cool completely on wire racks.
CHOCOLATE CUPCAKES:
1. Spoon batter into paper-lined muffin pans, filling each cup half full.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 18 minutes.
3. Remove from pans and let cool on wire racks.
4. Frost as desired.
